title: Assault on Kashyyyk

{{Quote|Welcome. I'm relieved to see that you survived the Empire's assault on Kashyyyk, but our situation is still dire. You are all that remains of the forces there, and we have no other resources to draw upon.|[[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]], speaking to the few survivors of the battle|<ref name="EaW" />}}
The '''assault on Kashyyyk''' took place early in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] on the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Planet/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. The forces of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] assaulted the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] monitoring outpost that had been established in secret on the planet. The initial Imperial attack was repelled by the Rebels, forcing the Empire to initiate a second assault. This time, the Empire was successful in taking control of Kashyyyk, although some of the Rebel [[Troop/Legends|troops]] had managed to evacuate from the planet.

==Prelude==
Some time prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] had secretly developed and built a small outpost on the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Planet/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], doing so right under the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] nose. The outpost consisted of a planetary [[Communications array/Legends|communications array]] for monitoring local radio traffic as well as a [[MilBar F-221/Legends|barracks]] to house a small garrison.<ref name="EaW" />

After a Rebel patrol squad sent into a nearby forest to perform a routine perimeter sweep disappeared, another patrol, [[Squad Three (Republic Navy)|Squad Three]], was sent out to search for the lost unit. The disappearance of the Rebel squad was, in fact, part of a ploy set up by the local Imperial forces to discover the location of the hidden Rebel outpost. The Empire had deployed a communications [[Jammer/Legends|jamming device]] in order to draw the Rebels out. The destruction of the device confirmed to the Imperial commander stationed there that there was indeed a Rebel presence, and an attack on the outpost was put into action immediately.<ref name="EaW" />

==Ground battle==
[[File:Kashyyyk_Skirmish.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Stormtroopers assault the Rebel outpost on Kashyyyk.]]
{{Quote|We're tracking multiple Imperial transports incoming from the east!|Rebel Base Dispatch, immediately after the destruction of the Imperial jamming device|<ref name="EaW" />}}
After destroying the jamming device and restoring their communications abilities, all Rebel patrols were recalled in order to defend the base. When Imperial markings were discovered on the remains of the device, the commander was able to deduce that their existence had been compromised and that enemy forces were on the way. Soon afterward, an Imperial attack force consisting of [[TIE ap-1|TIE Maulers]], [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], and [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transports]] was able to advance upon and attack the Rebel outpost, having discovered its location. The attack was repelled, however, and the Alliance ground forces were able to move on to capture several Imperial landing zones deeper within the forest.<ref name="EaW" />

==Space battle==
{{Quote|An Imperial peace-keeping envoy deployed to Kashyyyk was assaulted by an unusually organized dissident group. This warrants our full attention. I am sending you to investigate a derelict space station being used as a haven by these… Rebels.|An Imperial officer stationed on [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]]|<ref name="EaW" />}}
[[File:Rebel_Kashyyyk_Station.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The Empire attacks the Rebel space station above Kashyyyk.]]

After the Rebels captured the final Imperial reinforcement point on the surface, the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] sent a task force consisting of four [[Tartan-class patrol cruiser|''Tartan''-class patrol cruisers]] and two [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ships]] plus their [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] support. The Imperial ships entered the [[Star system/Legends|star system]] and destroyed the small [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] [[Alliance Space Station|space station]], which the Rebels had occupied and refurbished only a short time before the battle; though it was still in a dilapidated state, the station was functional enough to mount a meager defense. In the orbital exchange that followed, the station, along with a Rebel [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] and several [[Starfighter/Legends|fighter]] and [[Bomber/Legends|bomber]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]], was destroyed. This action forced the Alliance to abandon Kashyyyk completely, retreating back to their base on the planet [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]].<ref name="EaW" />

==Aftermath==
In the wake of the skirmish in orbit, the Empire sent a scouting force down the planet's gravity well to reclaim Kashyyyk after the Rebel Alliance had been forced to evacuate. The surviving Rebel forces had retreated to the main [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]], which was stationed over Bothawui at the time. The Rebel leader [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] was relieved to see that there were survivors from Kashyyyk, but she explained to them that the [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]]-strapped Alliance was now in dire need of new sources of income if it was to have any chance of withstanding further Imperial assaults.<ref name="EaW" />

The Rebels then proceeded to establish a new base on the planet [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]], but it was soon also discovered and subsequently overrun by an Imperial [[Battle of Ryloth (Galactic Civil War)|assault]], thanks to data that the Empire had managed to obtain from the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] logs kept by a captured Rebel [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. A short time later, an [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] [[Company/Legends|company]] was deployed to relieve another Rebel outpost present on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], which had come under siege by the Imperial Navy and [[Imperial Army/Legends|Army]].<ref name="EaW" />

==Behind the scenes==
This battle is one of two combat training levels in the real-time strategy [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'', developed by [[Petroglyph]] and published by [[LucasArts]] in [[2006]].

Occasionally, the player can be given 10,000 credits at the start of the Space combat training level. This allows the player to construct a Level 3 Space Station and supplant their given forces with additional [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]] and [[TIE/sr starfighter|TIE Scouts]]. The player can even upgrade their Space Station to Level 4 and construct [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobiliser 418 cruisers]] and [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defenders]], if done in the [[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption|''Forces of Corruption'']] expansion.
